title: 10 Herbal Tinctures For Hair Fall
description: Silybum marianum tinctures contains flavonoids, terpenoids, and silymarin, a combination of antioxidant and anti-inflammatory compounds. These properties help to reduce hair fall by protecting the hair follicles from damage and promoting healthy scalp conditions. Silymarin specifically has been shown to improve the integrity of the hair shaft, reducing breakage and promoting a healthy growth cycle.
